rows.CNzh: 保护我们吧……
rows.TWzh: 請守護我們……
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}われ>我らを<Ruby={2:4}まも>守りたまえ…
rows.USen: Please...protect us.

rows.CNzh: 那是什么！？
rows.TWzh: 那是什麼……！？
rows.JPja: なんだ アレは！？
rows.USen: What is that?!

rows.CNzh: 从空中降下了巨大瀑布！？
rows.TWzh: 天空中出現了巨大瀑布！？
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}そら>空から<Ruby={2:4}おお>大きな<Ruby={2:4}たき>滝が！？
rows.USen: A waterfall from the sky?!

rows.CNzh: 那条鱼是……！？
rows.TWzh: 那條魚是……！？
rows.JPja: あの<Ruby={2:6}さかな>魚は…！？
rows.USen: That fish!

<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>Wow! I was wondering who that might
be, and it turns out to be none other
than Link!

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>おお！ リンク<Ruby={2:4}どの>殿！<unk[5:1]>
ミファー<Ruby={2:4}さま>様のもとへと よくぞ<Ruby={2:4}まい>参られた！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>Wow, it's Link! <unk[5:1]>It's so good of you to
come visit Lady Mipha.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:256]>请看……<unk[5:0]>这座雷兽山也焕然新生，<unk[5:0]>
成为供奉米法大人雕像的公园了。
如今大人就在这里
守护我们卓拉族。
这一次能熬过淤泥灾难，<unk[5:0]>
正是因为有大家的努力和伟人的保佑啊……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:256]>請看……<unk[5:0]>這座雷獸山重生之後<unk[5:0]>
成為供奉米法大人雕像的公園了。
如今他正從此處
守護著我們卓拉族。
正是靠大家的努力和偉人的保佑，<unk[5:0]>
我們才能度過這次的淤泥災難呢……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:256]>ご<Ruby={2:4}らん>覧あれ…<unk[5:0]> この<Ruby={6:14}らいじゅうざん>雷獣山も <Ruby={2:2}う>生まれ<Ruby={2:2}か>変わって<unk[5:0]>
ミファー<Ruby={2:4}さま>様の<Ruby={2:4}ぞう>像を<Ruby={2:4}まつ>祀る<Ruby={4:8}こうえん>公園と なったぞ
<Ruby={2:4}いま>今や ここで
<Ruby={4:8}われわれ>我々ゾーラを <Ruby={4:6}みまも>見守っておられる
このヘドロ<Ruby={2:4}なん>難を<Ruby={2:2}た>耐えられるのも<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:4}みな>皆の<Ruby={4:8}どりょく>努力と
<Ruby={4:6}いじん>偉人のご<Ruby={4:4}かご>加護があってこそ… だな
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]>Look... <unk[5:0]>Do you see how much Ploymus
Mountain has changed?<unk[5:0]> It now enshrines
a glorious statue of Mipha.
She looks after the Zora from here.
Just like she always did...

The reason we can endure this sludge is
because of everyone's efforts <unk[5:0]>and also
thanks to her kind protection.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>米法大人
就在这里守护着卓拉族。
我等一定要挺过这次淤泥灾难，
不能让大人脸上无光。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>米法大人
正從此處守護著我們卓拉族。
為了不讓大人蒙羞，
我們務必要克服這場淤泥帶來的難關。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>ミファー<Ruby={2:4}さま>様は
ここで ゾーラを<Ruby={4:6}みまも>見守っていてくださる
<Ruby={4:8}われわれ>我々は それに<Ruby={2:2}は>恥じぬよう<Ruby={2:6}はたら>働き
このヘドロ<Ruby={2:4}なん>難を <Ruby={2:2}の>乗り<Ruby={2:2}こ>越えなくてはな
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>Mipha is always protecting the Zora.


We must work hard to honor her legacy by
overcoming this troublesome sludge.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>说起来，石像脚下
游动着一些前所未见的鱼。
刚才我还听到有东西扑通一声掉进池子……<unk[5:0]>
是仰慕米法大人而来的吗……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>說起來，雕像腳邊有些
前所未見的魚在游動喔。
剛才我好像聽到有什麼東西掉進水池裡的聲音……<unk[5:0]>
這些魚是仰慕米法大人而來的嗎……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>そういえば <Ruby={4:8}せきぞう>石像の<Ruby={4:8}あしもと>足元に
<Ruby={2:2}み>見た<Ruby={2:4}こと>事もない<Ruby={2:6}さかな>魚が <Ruby={2:4}およ>泳いでいるぞ
<Ruby={2:4}さき>先ほど ボチャっと<Ruby={2:4}いけ>池に<Ruby={2:2}お>落ちる<Ruby={2:4}おと>音を<Ruby={2:2}き>聞いたが…<unk[5:0]>
ミファー<Ruby={2:4}さま>様を<Ruby={2:4}した>慕って やって<Ruby={2:2}き>来たのだろうか…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>By the way, there are some fish I've never
seen before swimming at the base of
this statue.
Just now, I could have sworn I heard
something plop into the water.

Whatever it was, I wonder if it was hoping
to get closer to Mipha.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>在下还在想是什么扑通一声，
竟然有从未见过的鱼在游动……<unk[5:1]>
是仰慕米法大人而来的吗……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>我還想說那聲噗通是什麼，
原來有前所未見的魚游在雕像附近……<unk[5:1]>
牠們是因為仰慕米法大人而來的嗎……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>ボチャっと <Ruby={2:4}おと>音がしたと<Ruby={2:4}おも>思えば
<Ruby={2:2}み>見た<Ruby={2:4}こと>事もない<Ruby={2:6}さかな>魚が <Ruby={2:4}およ>泳いでいる…
ミファー<Ruby={2:4}さま>様を<Ruby={2:4}した>慕って やって<Ruby={2:2}き>来たのだろうか…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>I thought I heard something plop into the
water, and then I saw some fish swimming
there that I've never seen before.<unk[5:1]>
I wonder if they are hoping to get closer
to Mipha.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 48]>那、<unk[5:0]>那是什么！？

<Color=red>东部的储水湖<Color=white>那边出现了<Color=red>光柱<Color=white>一样的东西……！
这也是天地异变带来的影响吗……？

<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 48]>那、<unk[5:0]>那是什麼！？

<Color=red>東部的儲水湖<Color=white>那邊出現了像是<Color=red>光柱<Color=white>的東西……！
這也是天地異變造成的影響嗎……？

<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 48]>なっ<unk[5:0]> なんだ アレは！？

<Color=red><Ruby={2:6}ひがし>東の<Ruby={6:10}ちょすいこ>貯水湖<Color=white>から <Color=red><Ruby={2:6}ひかり>光の<Ruby={2:6}はしら>柱<Color=white>のようなものが…！<unk[5:0]>
これも <Ruby={8:12}てんぺんちい>天変地異の<Ruby={4:10}えいきょう>影響なのだろうか…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 48]>Over there...<unk[5:0]> What is that?!


Something resembling a <Color=red>pillar of light<Color=white> has
appeared at <Color=red>East Reservoir Lake<Color=white>! I wonder
if this, too, is related to the Upheaval.

<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]><Color=red>东部的储水湖<Color=white>那边出现了<Color=red>光柱<Color=white>一样的东西……！

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 48]>从、<unk[5:0]>从空中降下了<Color=red>巨大瀑布<Color=white>！？

啊……<unk[5:0]>米法大人，
请您庇佑我们卓拉族……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 48]>天、<unk[5:0]>天空中降下了<Color=red>巨大瀑布<Color=white>！？
如此接二連三地……<unk[5:0]>完全就是天地異變……
啊……<unk[5:0]>米法大人，
請保佑我們卓拉族……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 48]>そっ<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:4}そら>空から<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}おお>大きな<Ruby={2:4}たき>滝<Color=white>が <Ruby={2:2}ふ>降ってきた！？

あぁ… ミファー<Ruby={2:4}さま>様<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}われ>我らゾーラ<Ruby={2:4}ぞく>族を お<Ruby={2:4}まも>守りください…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 48]>I can hardly believe it!<unk[5:0]> A <Color=red>massive waterfall<Color=white>
came down from the sky?!<unk[5:0]> Everything is
topsy-turvy ever since the Upheaval!
Princess Mipha...<unk[5:0]> Please protect your
faithful Zora from on high...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>竟会从空中降下<Color=red>巨大瀑布<Color=white>……
米法大人……请您庇佑我们卓拉族……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>天空中居然降下了<Color=red>巨大瀑布<Color=white>……
米法大人……請保佑我們卓拉族……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]><Ruby={2:4}そら>空から<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}おお>大きな<Ruby={2:4}たき>滝<Color=white>が <Ruby={2:2}ふ>降り<Ruby={2:4}そそ>注ぐとは…<unk[5:0]>
ミファー<Ruby={2:4}さま>様… <Ruby={2:4}われ>我らゾーラ<Ruby={2:4}ぞく>族を お<Ruby={2:4}まも>守りください…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>To think a <Color=red>massive waterfall<Color=white> tumbled down
from the sky! Princess Mipha...<unk[5:0]> Please
protect your faithful Zora from on high.

rows.TWzh: 唔……水居然……！
rows.JPja: くっ… <Ruby={2:4}みず>水が…！
rows.USen: The water!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 48]>哦？<unk[5:0]>
我以为是谁呢，这不是林克阁下吗？
<unk[3:0:256]>想必……林克阁下也是寻找新的跳水圣地，
才寻到这里来的吧！？
唉……虽然感到万分悲痛，<unk[5:0]>
但是在下必须告诉林克阁下。
<Size=125><unk[3:0:4]><unk[4:0:24 87 111 114 107 72 101 97 118 121 95 48 49]>这里！<unk[5:1]>没有<unk[5:0]>水！！

<unk[3:0:266]><Size=100>在下还满心雀跃地幻想在这片庄严的遗迹
或许能开拓跳水的新境界……
然而当我到达之后……<unk[5:0]>
水竟突然退去，底部一览无遗！
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:24 87 111 114 107 72 101 97 118 121 95 48 48]>光有跳水的人，跳水是无法成立的！<unk[5:0]>
还需要能跳入的水啊！<Size=125><Size=100>
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 48]>哦？<unk[5:0]>
我還想說是誰呢，這不是林克閣下嗎！
<unk[3:0:256]>那麼……林克閣下也是為了尋找
新的跳水地點而來到這裡的吧！？
嗯……雖然非常難過，<unk[5:0]>
但我必須告知林克閣下……
<Size=125><unk[3:0:4]><unk[4:0:24 87 111 114 107 72 101 97 118 121 95 48 49]>這裡！<unk[5:1]>完全！<unk[5:0]>沒有水！！

<unk[3:0:266]><Size=100>我還興奮地想說，如此莊嚴的遺跡
有可能為跳水帶來嶄新的感受呢……
結果當我抵達之後……<Size=125><Size=100><unk[5:0]>
水居然瞬間消失，連底部都一覽無遺了！
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:24 87 111 114 107 72 101 97 118 121 95 48 48]>光只有跳水的人是無法跳水的！<unk[5:0]>
必須要有能跳進去的水才行啊！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 48]>おお？<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}だれ>誰かと<Ruby={2:4}おも>思えば リンク<Ruby={2:4}どの>殿ではないか！
<unk[3:0:256]>さては… <Ruby={2:4}あら>新たな<Ruby={2:2}と>飛び<Ruby={2:2}こ>込みスポットを<Ruby={2:4}さが>探して
リンク<Ruby={2:4}どの>殿も ここまで<Ruby={2:4}たど>辿り<Ruby={2:2}つ>着いたのだな！？
むう… <Ruby={4:10}だんちょう>断腸の<Ruby={2:4}おも>思いだが…<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:10}しょうせい>小生は リンク<Ruby={2:4}どの>殿にお<Ruby={2:4}つた>伝えせねばならん
<Size=125><unk[3:0:4]><unk[4:0:24 87 111 114 107 72 101 97 118 121 95 48 49]>ここには！<unk[5:1]> <Ruby={2:4}みず>水が<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:2}な>無い！！

<unk[3:0:266]><Size=100>この<Ruby={2:6}おごそ>厳かな<Ruby={4:6}いせき>遺跡なら <Ruby={2:2}と>飛び<Ruby={2:2}こ>込みの<Ruby={2:4}あら>新たな<Ruby={4:8}きょうち>境地が
<Ruby={2:4}ひら>開けるやもと <Ruby={4:10}しょうせい>小生も<Ruby={4:10}こころおど>心躍っていたのだが…
<Ruby={4:10}とうちゃく>到着するや<Ruby={2:4}いな>否や なんと…<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:6}いっき>一気に<Ruby={2:4}みず>水が<Ruby={2:2}ひ>引いて <Ruby={2:4}そこ>底が<Ruby={4:6}まるみ>丸見えだ！
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:24 87 111 114 107 72 101 97 118 121 95 48 48]><Ruby={2:2}と>飛び<Ruby={2:2}こ>込む<Ruby={2:4}もの>者だけでは ダイビングは<Ruby={4:8}せいりつ>成立しない！<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:2}と>飛び<Ruby={2:2}こ>込まれる<Ruby={2:4}みず>水が <Ruby={4:8}ひつよう>必要なのだ！<Size=125><Size=100>
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 48]>Hm? <unk[5:0]>Well, now! Is that not you, Link?!


<unk[3:0:256]>Let me guess... Have you also come here
in search of a lovely new diving spot?

If so, I have some heartbreaking news to
share.<unk[5:0]> This will be tough to bear, but I ask
that you stay strong.
<Size=125><unk[3:0:4]><unk[4:0:24 87 111 114 107 72 101 97 118 121 95 48 49]>There is...<unk[5:1]>no water here!<unk[5:0]> NONE!


<unk[3:0:266]><Size=100>I had hoped to break new ground by
diving amid these solemn ruins. I was
positively brimming with excitement!
Alas, my joy was short lived. <unk[5:0]>When I
arrived, the water suddenly retreated
until I could see the ground beneath!
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:24 87 111 114 107 72 101 97 118 121 95 48 48]>A diver without water...is like a bird
without sky.<unk[5:0]> It is a sad state of affairs,
I assure you.<Size=125><Size=100>

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>おぉ リンク<Ruby={2:4}どの>殿…！

<Ruby={4:10}しょうせい>小生… <Ruby={6:8}なごりお>名残惜しさで この<Ruby={2:2}ち>地に<Ruby={2:4}とど>留まっているが
<Ruby={4:6}あいか>相変わらず <Ruby={2:4}みず>水は<Ruby={2:2}ひ>引いたままだ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>Link!


I find myself reluctant to leave this spot,
but in truth, the water is still nowhere to
be seen.

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:10 84 105 114 101 100]>くぅ…<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:2}お>惜しいなぁ…<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}みず>水が<Ruby={2:2}ひ>引いて <Ruby={2:4}そこ>底が<Ruby={4:6}まるみ>丸見えではないか…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:10 84 105 114 101 100]>Argh. <unk[5:0]>I am battling terrible bitterness over
this.<unk[5:0]> The water has retreated so much you
can see the ground beneath. How pitiful!

rows.CNzh:
在下到达之后，
水就伴随着地形崩塌般的巨响退去了……
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>毕竟此地是一处古老的遗迹，
会不会是某处开了一个大洞呢？
只要有水，
这里一定会是最棒的跳水圣地啊……
rows.TWzh:
當我抵達之後，
水就伴隨著地形崩塌般的巨響消失了……
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>不過這畢竟是古代遺跡，
或許在哪裡開了一個大洞也說不定？
要是有水的話，
這裡一定會是最棒的跳水地點呢……
rows.JPja:
<Ruby={4:10}しょうせい>小生が <Ruby={4:10}とうちゃく>到着するや<Ruby={2:4}いな>否や
<Ruby={4:6}ちけい>地形が<Ruby={2:4}くず>崩れるような <Ruby={4:8}ごうおん>轟音と<Ruby={2:4}とも>共に<Ruby={2:4}みず>水が<Ruby={2:2}ひ>引いたが…
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>なにぶん <Ruby={2:4}ふる>古い<Ruby={4:6}いせき>遺跡であるがゆえ
どこかに <Ruby={4:8}おおあな>大穴でも<Ruby={2:2}あ>空いたのではないか？
<Ruby={2:4}みず>水さえ <Ruby={2:2}は>張っていれば
<Ruby={4:8}さいこう>最高の<Ruby={2:2}と>飛び<Ruby={2:2}こ>込みスポットだったというのに…
rows.USen:
When I arrived, I heard a thunderous roar.
It was as though the ground itself was
crumbling. Then the water retreated.
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>As these ruins are quite old, I have
wondered if perhaps a gaping hole
has opened up somewhere.
If only there was still precious water
here, it would have been a glorious
diving spot. Alas...

rows.CNzh: 居然有个大洞……
rows.TWzh: 居然有個大洞……
rows.JPja: <Ruby={4:8}おおあな>大穴があったとは…
rows.USen: A gaping hole!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>什么……！！<unk[5:1]>
水退光后的祭殿深处竟然有一个大洞……！？
而且底下有一处开阔的空间，
里面还供奉着护胫……！？
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>果然，在下的推断没有错！！<PageBreak>为了开拓跳水的新境界，
就让在下跳入这个大洞吧！
林克阁下……！<unk[5:1]>
作为跳水的同好，感谢你提供的消息！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>什麼……！！<unk[5:1]>

而且那底下居然是一處寬敞的空間，

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>在下的推測果然沒錯！！<PageBreak>為了開拓跳水的全新境界，
就讓在下跳入那個大洞吧！

身為跳水的同好，感謝您提供這項情報！

<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>なんと…！！<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={4:4}ひあ>干上がった<Ruby={4:8}さいでん>祭殿の<Ruby={2:4}おく>奥に <Ruby={4:8}おおあな>大穴が…！？

すねあてが <Ruby={4:8}ほうのう>奉納されていたですと…！？
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>やはり <Ruby={4:10}しょうせい>小生の<Ruby={4:4}みた>見立てに <Ruby={4:6}まちが>間違いはなかった！！<PageBreak><Ruby={2:2}と>飛び<Ruby={2:2}こ>込みの<Ruby={2:4}あら>新たなる<Ruby={4:8}きょうち>境地を <Ruby={2:4}ひら>開くべく

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>My word!<unk[5:1]> You really found a gaping hole
in the dried-up ruins?!

And also a wide space at the bottom
of the hole housing those incredible
greaves?!
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>Now that all is said and done...it is clear
that my instincts were spot on! I knew this
was destined to be an ideal diving spot!
Let us now break new diving ground,
fellow diving fiend. Off we go, into that
gaping hole of promised diving glory!
Link...Hero of the Dive. <unk[5:1]>Thank you for
sharing this important update with me!

was draining out through a gaping hole.

I knew without doubt that this would be
an ideal diving spot. My instincts have yet
to lead me astray!

<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>哦！<unk[5:0]>林克阁下！<unk[5:1]>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>Ah! <unk[5:0]>Link!<unk[5:1]> I have not set eyes on you
since we met beneath the whirlpool.

<unk[3:0:256]>Who could have guessed that a gaping
hole in these solemn ruins would drain
out all of the precious water.
I have just returned after enjoying a lovely
dive into said gaping hole. It was all that
I hoped it would be!
<unk[3:0:263]>Leaving such an ideal spot is regretful,
but I have little choice...<unk[5:0]> I must chase the
next perfect dive! Such is my destiny!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>前所未有的大漩涡……<unk[5:0]>没有比这里
更让人雀跃的跳水圣地了！
在这里跳水，
舍我其谁呢？
<unk[4:0:14 87 111 114 107 95 48 49]>下定决心后，在下猛地睁开眼睛，<unk[5:0]>
用力蹬地纵身一跃，华丽地跳了下去！
……然后发现里面是一处庄严的遗迹。

我预感下一个跳水圣地就是这里，
内心震颤狂喜，但是……
<Size=125><unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:24 87 111 114 107 72 101 97 118 121 95 48 49]>周围<unk[5:0]>没有<unk[5:0]>水！！<Size=100>

<unk[3:0:263]>没有水的地方，在下跳不下去啊。<unk[5:0]>
太可惜了，只能去寻找下一个跳水圣地了。

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>那個前所未有的大漩渦……<unk[5:0]>

如果我不跳，
還有誰會跳呢！

我想說這會是下一個跳水地點，
當我興奮不已時，卻發現……

雖然很可惜，但也只能去尋找下一個跳水地點了。

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>A whirlpool that previously did not exist.<unk[5:0]>
Such an exciting diving spot is a rare
gift indeed!
If I do not dive there, who will?! It is my
DUTY to take the plunge!

<unk[4:0:14 87 111 114 107 95 48 49]>I was determined to do just that. <unk[5:0]>I took a
deep breath, kicked off the ground in a
single bound, and dove in, full of grace!
Instead of my perfect dive...I was greeted
with these solemn ruins within.

I was so profoundly moved by the promise
of such a breathtaking new diving spot.

<Size=125><unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:24 87 111 114 107 72 101 97 118 121 95 48 49]>But alas!<unk[5:0]> There was no water!<unk[5:0]><Size=100>


<unk[3:0:263]>As masterful as I am, I still cannot dive
where there is no water.<unk[5:0]> Sadly, I must
find some other spot to dive.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>林克阁下！<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:268]>果然还是要那个……<unk[5:0]>

如果从那里跳下，在下落的过程中，

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>Link! I am on the hunt for the next perfect
diving spot!

<unk[3:0:268]>My eye has been caught...by that massive
waterfall that begins waaay up in the sky!

If I dive in from there, I am certain I will
find ultimate peace and clarity as I fall!

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>That massive waterfall that begins waaay
up in the sky... It is my destiny!

If I dive in from there, I will see my true
colors shine brighter than ever upon the
water's surface as I gracefully fall!
